title: Female Gender Mod
description: The Female Gender Mod introduces extra player model customization options, including a unique feature that adds a personalized touch to your avatar.
body:
The primary goal of this mod is to enhance your Minecraft player's appearance by adding breasts, providing a distinctive look compared to the standard model.

This mod is client-side. Though you can install it on a server for settings synchronization between players.



Controls
  • H - Open Wildfire's Gender Menu
  • [Pre 1.21.6] G - Open Wildfire's Gender Menu
Dependencies
  • Fabric API for Fabric Version
Incompatible
  • Skin Layers 3D
Bedrock Edition Players
If you're playing on Bedrock Edition, consider using the Extended Character Appearance add-on for a similar customizable player appearance experience. There are no plans to backport to older versions, I will only be updating on the most recent Minecraft version.
